# remnawave_nodes_metrics (Data Source)

Returns per-node metrics from the Remnawave panel.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "remnawave_nodes_metrics" "live" {}

output "node_metrics" {
  value = data.remnawave_nodes_metrics.live
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `nodes` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes))

<a id="nestedatt--nodes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes`

Read-Only:

- `country_emoji` (String)
- `inbounds_stats` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--inbounds_stats))
- `node_name` (String)
- `node_uuid` (String)
- `outbounds_stats` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--nodes--outbounds_stats))
- `provider_name` (String)
- `users_online` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--nodes--inbounds_stats"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.inbounds_stats`

Read-Only:

- `download` (String)
- `tag` (String)
- `upload` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--nodes--outbounds_stats"></a>
### Nested Schema for `nodes.outbounds_stats`

Read-Only:

- `tag` (String)
